fields.paper_left: Mistral AI Now Summit: partnerships, products, big vision
fields.paper_right: no benchmarks, no pricing, vibes for work

narrative_summary: The joke reframes Mistral's own summit slogan 'Vibe for Work' as an accidental self-own — the event literally had no hard data, just vibes.
rationale: Candidate 5 earns its punchline by weaponizing Mistral's own branding against them — 'Vibe for Work' as an accidental confession that the summit was content-free is a genuinely fresh angle, not just a restatement of the setup. The self-own framing is more surprising than the four anakin_padme entries, which all land on the same '...right?' beat without meaningful differentiation.
story_title: Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit
place: at a product launch where the live demo crashes
hat_pair: shower cap covered in sticky notes
